criteria_verification.criterion_text: `assemble_tool_list` returns the 9 tools in stable alphabetical order: `calculate, capabilities_refresh, capabilities_subscribe_updates, dispatch_by_capability, get_calendar_events, list_available_capabilities, queue_build, read_file, search_web`.
criteria_verification.evidence: The function returns a literal list in the documented order. TestAC003AlphabeticalOrder.test_tool_names_match_expected_order asserts the names are exactly the documented sequence; test_order_is_idempotent_across_calls confirms repeated invocations yield identical ordering.
criteria_verification.notes: The function returns a literal list in the documented order. TestAC003AlphabeticalOrder.test_tool_names_match_expected_order asserts the names are exactly the documented sequence; test_order_is_idempotent_across_calls confirms repeated invocations yield identical ordering.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `assemble_tool_list` is the **only** place that binds capability_registry into the capability + dispatch tools via closure (snapshot isolation).
criteria_verification.evidence: assemble_tool_list rebinds capabilities._capability_registry and dispatch._capability_registry to fresh list(capability_registry) copies — no other code in src/jarvis/ touches those attributes. TestAC004SnapshotIsolation covers: (a) both modules receive the snapshot, (b) the snapshots are independent list objects, (c) mutating the operator's outer list after assemble does not leak into either module, (d) general._config is set to the passed config, (e) end-to-end the catalogue tool surfaces the assembled descriptor.
criteria_verification.notes: assemble_tool_list rebinds capabilities._capability_registry and dispatch._capability_registry to fresh list(capability_registry) copies — no other code in src/jarvis/ touches those attributes. TestAC004SnapshotIsolation covers: (a) both modules receive the snapshot, (b) the snapshots are independent list objects, (c) mutating the operator's outer list after assemble does not leak into either module, (d) general._config is set to the passed config, (e) end-to-end the catalogue tool surfaces the assembled descriptor.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: No other module imports `jarvis.tools.general`, `jarvis.tools.capabilities`, `jarvis.tools.dispatch` directly — only `jarvis.tools`.
criteria_verification.evidence: TestAC005NoSubmoduleImports walks every .py file under src/jarvis/ outside src/jarvis/tools/ and asserts no AST import targets jarvis.tools.general, jarvis.tools.capabilities, or jarvis.tools.dispatch. Intra-package sibling imports (dispatch.py importing capabilities.py, etc.) are explicitly skipped — they are required for the implementation to compose. Updated tests/test_reserved_packages.py and tests/test_import_graph.py to remove jarvis.tools from the reserved-empty list since the package is now populated; the boundary discipline is enforced by the new submodule-import test instead.
